mapper.sql: id, email, code, type, expire_time, is_used, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO verification_code (email, code, type, expire_time) VALUES (#{email}, #{code}, #{type}, #{expireTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM verification_code WHERE email = #{email} AND type = #{type} AND is_used = 0 AND expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE verification_code SET is_used = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM verification_code WHERE expire_time < NOW()
